description: Needs data, spreadsheets, and logical proof before deciding. Will ask detailed questions about fee structures, ROI calculations, occupancy rates, and want to see the STR net analyser. Decision is rational, not emotional. Slowest conversion cycle but highest loyalty once converted.
top_fears: numbers do not add up once all costs accounted for
fee structure is more complex than presented
occupancy data is cherry-picked not representative
making an emotional decision they later regret financially
top_questions: What is the exact fee breakdown?
What are average occupancy rates for my area?
Can I see the STR net analyser output?
What is the total cost of setting up?
How does your 15% compare to competitors?
What is net profit after all platform fees?
Can I have the figures in writing?
what_resonates: STR net analyser showing real projected income
transparent fee structure: 15% management plus VAT, no hidden fees
Airbnb platform fee is separate (3%) and visible
actual payout history from comparable properties
detailed comparison: STR net vs LTL net vs mortgage
zero upfront cost reduces break-even calculation
written documents: management agreement, action plan, quote
what_to_avoid: vague income claims without supporting data
rushing past their questions to close
making claims that cannot be documented
ideal_response_pattern: Answer every question directly with numbers then provide the written breakdown then offer to send the STR net analyser then invite follow-up questions
closing_approach: Send full written package: management agreement, STR net analyser output, action plan. Give them time to review. Follow up with: Any numbers you would like me to clarify?
typical_blockers: wants to see actual performance data not projections
accountant or financial adviser needs to review
follow_up_strategy: Send the full document pack. Schedule a follow-up call specifically framed as a Q and A session for their remaining questions. Never rush.

notable_leads.name: Andrew McIntee
notable_leads.note: EXCEPTIONAL OFFER: 12%+VAT — only case in entire portfolio. Analytical enough to push on fees. Do not replicate without explicit Zac approval.

notable_leads.name: Rebecca Chmiel
notable_leads.note: Detailed fee questions. Needs written breakdown.

notable_leads.name: Vishal Beeharry
notable_leads.note: R2R operator with analytical mindset. High risk profile. Needs detailed commercial viability analysis.

notable_leads.name: Marcus
notable_leads.note: Most recent entry. Analytical. Purchasing property — needs proof of returns before committing.
